titleStmt.title: SII 23.286: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 286. (A.R. No. 286 of 1907.) Tiruviḍaimarudūr, Kumbhakonam Taluk, Tanjavur District Mahāliṅgasvāmi temple—in the same place Vikrama-Chōḷa: year 5: 1121-22 A.D.

summary.p: This also commences with the introduction Pūmādu puṇara etc. This registers a grant of 175 kuḻi of land after bringing it under cultivation, by one Āṭkoṇḍāṉ Arikularāja-mārāyaṉ of the Viraśōḻa-Aṇukkar (regiment ?), so as to provide 10 kalam and odd of paddy per year, to meet the expenses of worship of god Māṇikkakkūttar (Naṭarāja) on all days of Amāvāsyā in the year and to pay the taxes on the land. The donor also paid one kāśu for the (daily) supply of a bathing water pot to the temple out of the interest on the amount.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . pūmātu puṇarap puvimātu malara nāmātu viḷaṅka jayamātu vi nnirupatu malar maṟṟavar cūṭa manniya Urimaiyil maṇimuṭi cūṭic ceṅkol ceṉṟu ticai ṟpa veṅkali niṅki meyyaṟan taḻaippak kaliṅka miriyak kaṭalmalai naṭātti valaṅkoḷāḻi varaiūḻinaṭātti Iru cuṭaraḷavum Orukuṭai niḻaṟkiḻ mukkokkiḻānaṭikaḷoṭum vira siṁhāsanattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakecari
panmarāṉa Uṭaiyār śrī vikkiramacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu 5Āvatu Uyyak koṇṭārvaḷanāṭṭut tiraimūrnāṭṭut tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār koyilil viracoḻa Aṇu Āṭkoṇṭānāna Arikularājamārāyan candrādittaval Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyār tirukkaṟṟaḷiyil māṇikkakkūttaṟku Amāvāsitoṟum tiruvamutu Uḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu vaṉavaiyiṟṟukkum caṭṭiccoṟṟuk
kum Amāvāsi Oṉṟukku nellu Aiñkuṟuṇi Irunāḻikku Orāṭṭaikku nellu Aiñkalane mukkuṟuṇiyum tevar kaṭamaikku Acal nilam varicaippaṭi munpu māttāl nellu Aṟukalattil cempātiyāl nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nellum patinkalane tūṇip patakku yāṇṭu Aiñcāvatuvarai payiṟcelaviṉṟiyey kollaiyāyk kiṭanta tiruviṭaimarutu
Uḷḷūril catācivanmayakkalil naṭuvil vaḻikku meṟku Īraṅkoḷḷik kālceyyil vaṭatalaiyil kollai nilam Orumā mukkāṇiyum Aiñcā vatuvarai payiṟ celaviṉṟiyey kiṭantamaiyil Ivan tan svam Iṭṭut tirutti nivantattukku nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum tevar kaṭamaikku nellu Aiñkalaney mukkuṟuṇiyum Āka nellum patin
kalaney tūṇippatakkum Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum Iṟuppatāka viṭṭa nilam kuḻi nūṟṟeḻupattaiñcināl nilam Orumā mukkāṇiyumviṭṭatu 11 meṟpaṭiyān candrādittaval Uṭaiyār tiruviṭaimarutuṭaiyāṟkup palicai cekuttu Oru tirumañcanak kuṭam vaikka śrīpaṇṭārattu Oṭuk kina kācu Oṉṟu Itu panmāheśvararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 23.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
